temporal_description: A close-up, profile shot shows a man with glasses and a shaved head in a dimly lit, dark environment. He wears a light-colored collared shirt. The lighting is stark, illuminating only the side of his face and casting the rest in deep shadow. In the top right corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. The audio is dominated by a high-energy, electronic music track with a driving, percussive beat and a dark, intense mood. The man appears to be speaking, his expression serious and focused. A sharp, percussive sound, like a quick clap or a sharp intake of breath, punctuates the music, adding to the dramatic and action-oriented atmosphere. The camera remains steady, maintaining the tight focus on the man's face. The scene cuts to a medium shot of a different man, also in a dimly lit setting with a cool, blue-green color palette. This man, wearing a dark leather jacket, is shown from the chest up. He holds a cigarette in his right hand, bringing it towards his mouth as if to light it. The background is out of focus, showing some blurred lights. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera is static, capturing the man's deliberate action.
